data.title: Solana Launches Solana Attestation Service (SAS)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana announced the launch of Solana Attestation Service (SAS) on the X platform, a new verification service that can be used to verify anything, aiming to provide a trust layer for the Internet capital market. SAS allows off-chain data to be associated with any Solana wallet, and applications can now verify information such as KYC/identity, investor certification, and on-chain reputation, while maintaining privacy through signature verification.

data.title: Expert sets date when Bitcoin will hit $200,000 in 2025
data.description:
After Bitcoin (BTC) hit a new all-time high this week, a trading expert believes the asset is on track for even greater gains, possibly reaching $200,000 in 2025. According to an analysis by TradingShot, historical trends and technical setups suggest that Bitcoin might reach the $200,000 mark toward the end of this year, as per a May 23 TradingView post. Bitcoin price analysis chart. Source: TradingView In the outlook, TradingShot emphasized that Bitcoin is currently experiencing its weakest bull cycle to date, a natural consequence of the Theory of Diminishing Returns (TDM)
source: https://finbold.com/expert-sets-date-when-bitcoin-will-hit-200000-in-2025/

data.title: Bitcoin Volatility Shows Slight Increase After Recent Low
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bitcoin's volatility has experienced a slight increase over the past two days, following a recent low of 1.58% on May 22. The current volatility rate is reported at 1.79%.

Bitcoin's volatility is often associated with speculative trading and retail investors' fear of missing out (FOMO). A decrease in volatility may indicate a reduction in short-term speculative activity, suggesting the market is entering a consolidation or 'cooling-off' period. Additionally, Bitcoin's price fluctuations are frequently linked to macroeconomic events, such as inflation expectations, interest rate changes, or geopolitical risks. When these external factors stabilize, Bitcoin's volatility may also decrease.

data.title: Can Bitcoin Price Lose $110k Support As Trump Proposes 50% Tariff on EU?
data.description:
Early trading on Friday saw Bitcoin price retreat, dropping below the $110,000 level. Stocks in the market fell after President Donald Trump suggested new tariffs. From June 1, 2025, all goods from the European Union will be subject to a 50% Tariff
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/24/can-bitcoin-price-lose-110k-support-as-trump-proposes-50-tariff-on-eu/

data.title: Telegram Rises in Global App Downloads as Meta Apps Decline
data.description: According to PANews, Telegram's founder Pavel Durov revealed on his personal channel that in the first quarter of 2025, Telegram climbed to eighth place in global app downloads. Meanwhile, Meta's suite of apps, including WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and Threads, experienced a decline in their download rankings.

data.title: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller Allocates $1,027,090,408 To Three Under-The-Radar Stocks
data.description:
Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller has now allocated more than a billion dollars to three under-the-radar equities. New filings show Druckenmiller’s Duquesne Family Office is betting big on stocks in the tech and healthcare sectors. As of Q1 2025, the firm’s largest position is in Natera Inc
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/24/billionaire-stanley-druckenmiller-allocates-1027090408-to-three-under-the-radar-stocks/

data.title: Hyperliquid's BTC Long Position Update by James Wynn
data.description: According to Odaily, James Wynn shared an update on the X platform regarding Hyperliquid's Bitcoin long position. The 40x leveraged long position has increased to approximately 11,588 BTC, with a position value reaching $1.266 billion. The opening price is $108,916, and the liquidation price is $105,179.

data.title: Messari: Mira's AI factual accuracy rises to 96%, with 500,000 daily active users
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Messari, a crypto and blockchain research platform, released a complete research report on Mira, which revealed that when AI output is filtered through Mira's consensus mechanism, the accuracy of facts increases from 70% to 96%. Currently, Mira verifies about 3 billion tokens in integrated applications every day, and its ecosystem (including cooperative projects) supports more than 4.5 million independent users, with daily active users reaching about 500,000.

data.title: James Wynn's BTC long position has reached $1.266 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: James Wynn released the updated information of his Hyperliquid's BTC long position on the X platform. The 40x long position increased to about 11,588 BTC, and the position value reached 1.266 billion US dollars. The opening price was 108,916 US dollars and the liquidation price was 105,179 US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 109,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.76% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 24, 2025, 10:46 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 109,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 109,072.84375 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.76% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Market Reacts to U.S. Tariff Announcement on EU
data.description: According to PANews, recent developments have stirred market concerns following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement of a 50% tariff on the European Union and a push for Apple to manufacture in the United States. Despite these concerns, the overall sentiment within the community remains optimistic, with Bitcoin bulls focusing on the $102,000 support level. Some traders are employing bearish options spreads to hedge against short-term volatility, using strategies such as B109P S106P for protection.

data.title: U.S. Regulatory Bodies Discuss Blockchain's Impact on Financial Markets
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's cryptocurrency task force and the U.S. Department of the Treasury recently met with the Plume team in Washington, D.C. The discussion focused on how an open blockchain ecosystem could enhance the competitiveness of U.S. cryptocurrency and capital markets. The tokenization and blockchain integration of markets such as stocks, bonds, loans, asset-backed securities, and commodities could lead to increased liquidity, efficiency, and transparency, particularly under the right regulatory framework. By collaborating with policymakers, Plume aims to achieve public policy outcomes that are as good as or better than those of existing market structures.
